hooks.command:
echo '
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
FORTUNE 500 AI BUSINESS OPERATING SYSTEM
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
Active agents: CEO | CFO | COO | GC | CTO | CMO | CRO | CHRO | Chief of Staff | Internal Audit | Board

Key commands:
  /start-initiative    Launch a new initiative
  /governance-check    Validate initiative governance status
  /pre-approval        Run full approval validation pipeline
  /board-report        Generate board report package
  /risk-assessment     Score enterprise risk
  /legal-review        Route matter to General Counsel
  /budget-request      Formal budget approval workflow
  /regulatory-check    Regulatory compliance screen
  /qbr                 Quarterly Business Review
  /crisis-response     Activate crisis response protocol
  /earnings-prep       Earnings preparation (public companies)
  /m-and-a-diligence   M&A due diligence workflow
  /end-initiative      Close-out an initiative
  /strategic-review    Annual strategic planning

Decision Authority Matrix active. All financial/legal thresholds enforced.
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ'
echo 'GOVERNANCE CHECK: Financial commitment detected. Verify DAM authority level before proceeding. Run /budget-request if threshold exceeded.'
echo 'GOVERNANCE CHECK: External communication detected. GC review required before any public statement, press release, or investor communication.'
echo 'GOVERNANCE CHECK: Board material detected. Ensure GC review is complete before distribution. All board materials are permanent corporate records.'
echo 'GOVERNANCE REMINDER: Initiative Brief updated. Ensure routing has been initiated to required approvers per DAM. Run /governance-check to validate status.'

echo '
GOVERNANCE CLOSE REMINDER:
- Are all open initiative actions logged with owners and deadlines?
- Are any pending approvals awaiting a response?
- Are there time-sensitive regulatory or legal matters requiring follow-up?
- Has the initiative register been updated?
Fortune 500 AI Business Operating System вЂ” Session End'
